name: The Superhero League 2
author: Poki
description: The Superhero League is back, and better than ever! In The Superhero League 2, you can play as a large variety of skilled heroes taking down bad guys and saving innocent lives in the process. Are you gonna throw the bad guys across town with Super Psychic, remove them from the map with Super Eraser, or cut them in half with the help of Super Scissors? The choice is yours! Are you ready to be the hero this town needs? How to play The Superhero League 2? Use your superpowers to get rid of the enemies and keep the hostages safe! Click, drag, or aim to find the right solution. Who created The Superhero League 2? The Superhero League 2 is created by Lion Studios. Play their other games on Poki: The Real Juggle , Sticker Book Puzzle , Family Tree! , Flick Goal , Mr Bullet , The Superhero League , Love Balls and Happy Glass ! How can I play The Superhero League 2 for free? You can play The Superhero League 2 for free on Poki. Can I play The Superhero League 2 on mobile devices and desktop? The Superhero League 2 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
